mapper.select:
/* adm-master-acxct-sql-oracle.xml selectAcxctCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT A.REPACKEY ,(SELECT ACNM FROM TADMIN_MST_AC AC WHERE AC.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND AC.ACKEY = A.REPACKEY) REPACNM ,A.ACKEY ,A.ACNM ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,A.DELYN ,A.REPACTYPE ,'REP_ACTYPE' ||';'|| A.REPACTYPE AS REP_ACTYPE_DESC ,A.ASNUSEYN ,A.OWKEY ,(SELECT OWNM FROM TADMIN_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNM ,'YESORNO' ||';'|| A.DELYN AS DELYN_DESC ,'YESORNO' ||';'|| A.ASNUSEYN AS ASNUSEYN_DESC FROM TADMIN_MST_AC A ) A
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* adm-master-acxct-sql-oracle.xml selectDetailAcxct */ /* 거래처별센터 디테일 */ SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT B.ACKEY ,(SELECT ACNM FROM TADMIN_MST_AC AC WHERE B.OWKEY=AC.OWKEY AND AC.ACKEY = B.ACKEY) ACNM ,(SELECT ACNM FROM TADMIN_MST_AC AC WHERE B.OWKEY=AC.OWKEY AND AC.ACKEY = A.REPACKEY) REPACNM ,CTKEY ,(SELECT CTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_CT WHERE CTKEY = B.CTKEY) CTNM ,B.URKEY ,B.URNM ,B.STOREORDTYPE ,B.ACICGRTYPE ,B.ETCACICGRTYPE ,B.NEWYN ,B.ACXCTTEL1 ,B.ACXCTTEL2 ,B.POORDTYPE ,B.INSERTDATE ,B.UPDATEDATE ,B.INSERTURKEY ,B.UPDATEURKEY ,B.BHAULINGYN ,B.LDGTM ,B.UNLDGTM ,B.POLEADTM ,B.PODDLNTIME ,B.RNDKEY ,B.ICGRPKEY ,B.DELYN ,B.SCMCK ,B.SCMURKEY ,A.REPACTYPE ,B.CARPLT ,B.OWKEY ,(SELECT OWNM FROM TADMIN_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = B.OWKEY) AS OWNM ,A.REPACKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_AC A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ACXCT B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ACKEY = #{ackey} AND B.DELYN = #{delyn} ) A
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY UPDATEDATE DESC

/* adm-master-acxct-sql-oracle.xml selectPkAcxct */ SELECT ACKEY ,(SELECT ACNM FROM TADMIN_MST_AC AC WHERE AC.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND AC.ACKEY = A.ACKEY) ACNM ,CTKEY ,(SELECT CTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_CT WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY) CTNM ,URKEY ,URNM ,STOREORDTYPE ,'STOREORDTYPE' || ';' || STOREORDTYPE AS STOREORDTYPE_DESC ,ACICGRTYPE ,'ACICGRTYPE' || ';' || ACICGRTYPE AS ACICGRTYPE_DESC ,ETCACICGRTYPE ,'ETC_ACICGRTYPE' || ';' || ETCACICGRTYPE AS ETC_ACICGRTYPE_DESC ,NEWYN ,'NEWYN' || ';' || NEWYN AS NEWYN_DESC ,ACXCTTEL1 ,ACXCTTEL2 ,POORDTYPE ,'POORDTYPE' || ';' || POORDTYPE AS POORDTYPE_DESC ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ,BHAULINGYN ,'BHAULINGYN' || ';' || BHAULINGYN AS BHAULINGYN_DESC ,LDGTM ,UNLDGTM ,POLEADTM ,PODDLNTIME ,RNDKEY ,ICGRPKEY ,DELYN ,SCMCK ,'YESORNO' ||';'|| A.SCMCK AS SCMCHECK_DESC ,SCMURKEY ,( SELECT B.REPACTYPE FROM TADMIN_MST_AC B WHERE A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND B.ACKEY = A.ACKEY ) AS REP_ACTYPE ,'REP_ACTYPE' ||';'|| ( SELECT B.REPACTYPE FROM TADMIN_MST_AC B WHERE A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND B.ACKEY = A.ACKEY ) AS REP_ACTYPE_DESC ,CARPLT FROM TADMIN_MST_ACXCT A WHERE ACKEY = #{ackey} AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey}
